$comment: Repo-wide minimum coverage floor for orchestrator agents and CI. These values are the floor — vitest.config.ts may enforce a stricter ceiling on a focused subtree (e.g. 100% on src/server/services/creditEngine/**). The repo-wide floor and the per-feature ceiling are intentionally separate: the floor protects unrelated areas of the codebase from regressing while the ceiling drives feature-level discipline. If you tighten one, do not loosen the other.

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. These are repo-wide minimums; vitest.config.ts may enforce a stricter per-subtree ceiling via coverage.include + coverage.thresholds (e.g. 100% on src/server/services/creditEngine/**). If coverage drops below this floor anywhere, or below the configured ceiling on the focused subtree, the task fails.
